query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "arcane: do role-playing language agents stay in character at the right" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it provides a fine-grained benchmark and empirical evaluation specifically measuring the "stay in character" mechanism (role identity maintenance) in LLMs, which is the core dependent variable of the user's question regarding role-playing agents.
